title: Naan Unnai Dhinamum Lyrics India Pakistan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Naan Unnai Dhinamum Song Lyrics From India Pakistan (2014)
Singer(s): Abhay Jodhpurkar, Swetha Mohan
Music: Dheena Devarajan

Naan unnai dhinamum ninaikkiren
arugil irundhum tholaikkiren.
nenjukkul kadhal iruppinum
unmayai solla thavikkiren.

Ennodu unnai pattri
dhinamum pesinen.
Un munney ullaththinai
maraikkiren.

Naan unnai dhinamum ninaikkiren
arugil irundhum tholaikkiren.
nenjukkul kadhal iruppinum
unmayai solla thavikkiren.

Nanngooramey ne potiye
neengaamal en nenjil paaindhaai.
Rangoliyin vannangalai
kanneeril yaen thoovinaai.

Naan payanam pogum vazhkayai
Yean panayam ketkkiraai.
Un varugai kaana vaasalil
Yaen kaakka vaikkiraai.

Naan unnai dhinamum ninaikkiren
arugil irundhum tholaikkiren.
nenjukkul kadhal iruppinum
unmayai solla thavikkiren.

Sooraavali kaattraagave
un niyabagam sulattri adikkum.
Theeraavazhi un roadu thaan
en kadhalum vazhndhidum.

En peyarai yaarum ketkayil
un peyarai solgiren.
nam peyarai ondru serkkavae
unnai naanum ketkkiren.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Naan Unnai Dhinamum'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between two individuals.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'India Pakistan'?

This song plays a significant role in portraying the romantic relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the film's emotional depth.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Abhay Jodhpurkar and Shweta Mohan, with music composed by Dheena Devarajan.

When was 'Naan Unnai Dhinamum' released?

The song was released on December 20, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Unnai Dhinamum, the protagonists express their unwavering love and the longing they feel for each other. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of romance and nostalgia, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. With its heartfelt lyrics and melodious composition, it evokes a sense of warmth and connection. This enchanting duet serves as a reminder of the power of love, resonating deeply with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Unnai Dhinamum from India Pakistan is a beautifully crafted romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Shweta Mohan, this song resonates with heartfelt emotions and a nostalgic vibe. The melodious composition by Dheena Devarajan adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I think of you every day, even when you're close, I feel lost. Even though love is in my heart, I struggle to express the truth.
I talk about you every day. I forget what’s in front of you.
Without you, I think about the world... I feel the darkness everywhere.
I think of you every day, even when you're close, I feel lost. Even though love is in my heart, I struggle to express the truth.
You have entered my heart without me knowing. Why did you bring the colors of the rangoli into my tears?
I am going on a journey, why are you asking about my journey? Why do you block the entrance to see you?
I think of you every day, even when you're close, I feel lost. Even though love is in my heart, I struggle to express the truth.
The storm will erase your memories. The path will lead my love to you.
No one asks my name, but I mention yours. I also want to hear our names together.
